title: LocalAI Gallery Model Spec
description: Schema for LocalAI gallery model YAML files

urls.description: URLs pointing to remote model configuration

config_file.description: Inline YAML configuration that will be written to the model config file

files.description: Files to download and install for this model

sha256.description: Optional SHA256 checksum for file verification

candidates.description: Ordered variant list of a meta entry. The first candidate the host satisfies is installed, under the meta entry's own name. An entry carrying candidates must not also carry files or config_file.

model.description: Name of a concrete (non-meta) gallery entry

capability.description: Host capability this candidate requires, matched exactly and case-sensitively (for example metal, nvidia-cuda-12). Absent matches any host.

min_vram.description: Authored VRAM floor, for example 20GiB. Authoritative: inference never overwrites it.

backend.description: Denormalized by the nightly job for display. Never authored by hand.

quantization.description: Denormalized by the nightly job for display. Never authored by hand.

inferred_min_vram.description: Denormalized by the nightly job as a fallback floor. Never authored by hand; min_vram wins.
